author: y4rr
content:
Phase 10 complete (with continuation). APPROVE.

Outcome: 13 PASS-able vision models -> 14 PASS-able. Inception-V3 is the LAST torchvision-comparable model PASS-able by Phase 10. Only Swin-T (#998 — needs shifted-window attention primitive) remains.

PASS-able value-parity models after Phase 10:
1-13. (Phase 9's 13)
14. Inception-V3 ✓ (NEW — max_abs=1.409e6, max_rel=3.092e-4 — abs huge from random-init logit magnitude on 23M-param model with 299×299 input; per-element allclose dominated by rel_tol budget)

Heaviest single migration in the series:
- inception.rs grew 520 → 1563 lines (+1043 net)
- BasicConv2d helper + 5 distinct Mixed module types (InceptionA/B/C/D/E) + InceptionV3 wrapper
- All torchvision-exact details preserved: BN eps=1e-3, Conv bias=false (BN follows), AvgPool count_include_pad=False, factorized 7×7/5×5/3×3 convs, parallel 1×3/3×1 splits in InceptionE, 11 Mixed modules with specific channel/pool_features/channels_7x7 per stage
- Param count: 23,834,568 — exact match to torchvision.models.inception_v3(weights=None, aux_logits=False)
- named_parameters dump diff'd line-by-line vs torchvision sorted set — zero diff. NO state_remap needed; passthrough.

Truncation recovered via continuation:
- Param-count fixture bound updated 400K-650K → 23.5M-24.5M
- Determinism test input 32×32 → 299×299 (Mixed_6a/7a stride-2 reductions underflow at smaller sizes)
- 5 #[ignore=#993] markers removed (1 main + 4 honest-fail probes — all now active)
- 1 src/ bug fix surfaced: InceptionV3::train()/eval() didn't propagate to self.dropout, so eval-mode forward kept dropout active (non-deterministic). Fixed in same dispatch.
- Fixture generated: input_sha256=2e73cf..., weights_sha256=67cb62..., ref_output_sha256=6a0945...

Verification (architect):
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision -- inception_v3_value_parity: ok
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision -- value_parity: 68 passed, 0 failed, 4 ignored (down from 9 — Phase 10 unignored 5)
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision (full): all bins green
- cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-vision -p ferrotorch-nn --tests --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean
- cargo build --workspace: clean
- git diff --stat -- ferrotorch-core/ ferrotorch-gpu/ ferrotorch-nn/: empty
- 13 prior PASSes preserved

Coordination boundaries 100% respected. The pre-flight's STOP-AND-REPORT scenarios (count_include_pad unsupported, 6th module type needed, non-square kernels unsupported) all DID NOT trigger — the Phase 5 primitive (Conv2d::new_full) and existing AvgPool2d already supported all required configurations.

Closing #993, #1012.
